name: Clear Mind

abilities.name: Torpor's Embrace
abilities.text: When an enemy model removes a friendly Scheme marker, if there are two or fewer friendly Scheme markers in play, one model with this ability may drain a (t). If it does not, replace this crew card with Clouded Mind.

abilities.name: The Altar Grows Thirsty
abilities.text: When resolving friendly Hunger tokens, deal 1 damage to an enemy model to remove the token, instead of an ally.

abilities.name: Glorious Purpose
abilities.text: When this model declares the Interact action, it may gain a Hunger token to increase the Rg of the action by +4".

extraction_notes: The first section states 'Friendly Returned models gain the following abilities:' covering Torpor's Embrace and The Altar Grows Thirsty
The second section states 'Friendly Returned models gain the following ability:' covering Glorious Purpose
Faction is not explicitly shown on this crew card
